name: Sunscreen plus DNA repair enzymes lowered CPDs and field cancerization more than sunscreen alone
summary: A small actinic-keratosis study provides human skin biomarker support for topical DNA repair enzyme products.
statement: In 28 patients with actinic keratosis, sunscreen plus DNA repair enzymes reduced field cancerization and cyclobutane pyrimidine dimer burden more than sunscreen alone over 6 months.
quantitative_note: The abstract reports a 61% CPD decrease in the enzyme group versus 35% with sunscreen alone at 6 months, with P<0.001.
caveats: The intervention was a topical skin product combined with sunscreen, so it does not establish systemic DNA repair enhancement.
The endpoints are skin biomarkers and premalignant field changes rather than durable aging outcomes.
